summary.zh: F1 世界锦标赛在这十年诞生：从阿尔法·罗密欧的增压式赛车统治开局，到范吉奥五度问鼎的传奇生涯，再到库珀的中置引擎方案在十年末彻底改变了赛车设计的方向。这十年的赛历中，印第安纳波利斯 500 也曾连续计入世界冠军积分。
summary.en: The Formula One World Championship was born this decade: from Alfa Romeo's supercharged early dominance, through Fangio's legendary five titles, to Cooper's mid-engine layout reshaping car design entirely by decade's end. The Indianapolis 500 also counted toward the championship every year of this decade.
